sourceTitle: M365 Copilot Chat, M365 Copilot, and Copilot Studio
evidenceSnippetOriginal: All PolyU staff and students can leverage M365 Copilot Chat via the PolyU Gen AI app, or by accessing it directly through the browser. M365 Copilot Chat utilizes the Microsoft Prometheus model, which is built upon OpenAI's GPT-4o.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: All PolyU staff and students can leverage M365 Copilot Chat via the PolyU Gen AI app, or by accessing it directly through the browser. M365 Copilot Chat utilizes the Microsoft Prometheus model, which is built upon OpenAI's GPT-4o.
